nasb.text: and had seen that some of His disciples were eating their bread with impure hands, that is, unwashed.

esv.text: they saw that some of his disciples ate with hands that were defiled, that is, unwashed.

cnv.text: 他們看見他的門徒有人用不潔的手，就是沒有洗過的手吃飯，

ccb.text: 他们看到祂的门徒有些吃饭前没有照礼仪洗手。

csbs.text: 他们看见耶稣的一些门徒用不洁净的手，就是没有洗过的手吃饭。
